name: LiFePO4 (Lithium Iron Phosphate)
notes: Best overall. Long life, safe, lightweight. Recommended for new installs.

name: AGM (Absorbent Glass Mat)
notes: Maintenance-free sealed lead acid. Good for budget builds.

name: Gel Battery
notes: Sealed gel electrolyte. Tolerates heat better than AGM.

name: Flooded Lead Acid (FLA)
notes: Lowest cost. Requires maintenance (watering). Ventilation required.
